title: ServiceType
content:
# ServiceType

Type of Service. `cluster_ip` restricts communication to within the cluster, not accessible externally. `node_port` makes the Service available on a static port across all Nodes. `host_port` exposes the Service on a designated port of the host Node only.

## Enum Values

- `cluster_ip`
- `node_port`
- `host_port`
summary: Type of Service. `cluster_ip` restricts communication to within the cluster, not accessible externally. `node_port` makes the Service available on a static port across all Nodes. `host_port` exposes the Service on a designated port of the host Node only.
